name: Hot and Sour Shrimp Soup- Tom Yam Goong
recipeIngredient: 2 stalks Lemon Grass, Lower 1/3 portion only, cut into 1-inch lengths
1 tsp Black Chili Paste (Nam Prik Pow)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse shrimp shells and place them in a large pot with water. Bring to boil, strain the broth, and discard shells.
2. Add garlic, lime leaves, galangal, fish sauce, lemon grass, and shallots to the stock. Cook gently for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in mushrooms and chili peppers (if using). Cook until vegetables are tender.
4. Add shrimp to the soup and bring back to boil. Cook until shrimp are pink and cooked through.
5. Remove from heat. Pour soup into a serving bowl, add lime juice, black chili paste, and garnish with cilantro leaves. Serve immediately.
